这深夜，真痛，真苦。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690046798,"group_id":"7073351479968402471","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2736034075650844"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073351479968402471","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.0140176e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50139,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7087612502036464421","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太搞笑了 没想到推荐榜里无心一点 竟然承包了我在番茄🍅的所有笑点 很有以前古早搞笑文那味儿 不油腻且异想天开 设定也真的很新奇 名字虽迎合市场 但着实切题 作者真是个妙人[大笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1650213388,"group_id":"7073351479968402471","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+3fjKArz+IL9sbOEpvExztixwPknx5xgqKCWjtzJ1Fw","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2736034075650844","user_name":"爱吃排毒美白水的贝拉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2736034075650844","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073351479968402471","book_info":{"abstract":"在唐晚还有半年寿命时，掌握了一种技能“穿越术”，能来回穿梭于现代与古代之间。
第1次穿越，被人当成鬼……
第99次穿越，差点死在狗皇帝手中。
第108次穿越，她“玷污”了皇帝清白。
历经数次穿越，惊喜发现，吸一吸龙气可以续命
唐晚：“薅，使劲薅疯批皇帝的龙气。”
皇帝(-‸-‶)：“唐晚，别吸了！朕把命都给你！”
某日，皇帝向周围人炫耀：“唉，这女人真是爱惨了朕，时时刻刻想轻薄朕。”
唐晚：“冤枉！这货在白日做梦！大家一定要不信谣、不传谣、不造谣！”
【沙雕女主vs腹黑自我攻略男主】

"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21368,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":111215},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1656907363,"author_reply_time":1656907371,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7085989264445735688","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看呀，作者大大很厉害，文笔自然，也挺好笑的。虽然我看书的时候觉得男主很欠，但是这样才符合他古代皇帝的感觉。特别是女主想坑男主反被男主利用，非常带劲，有那种皇帝腹黑无情的样子了，我以为男主会被女主耍的团团转，结果是女主被耍，虽然很心疼，但是真的很好笑。我并不喜欢女主穿越到古代就能把古代人耍的团团转，古代人也没这么傻，男主真的很聪明，虽然也是真的有些时候很欠[酷]
里面也有很多有趣的剧情，真的很好看，作者大大加油，什么都好，就是更的太少[思考]加油加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1649835445,"group_id":"7073351479968402471","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"看书多年，永远在准备写小说的路上，凭心情挖坑。。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3iKUgBBYvGRqvAwPrMLmMw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3b38a280758a42a8bea73f1c394bfe45~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622792&x-signature=gn7BHNgJ2%2FPZzzoJfAxlBtkX1hE%3D","user_id":"53241669755758","user_name":"木木初"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"53241669755758","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7073351479968402471","book_info":{"abstract":"在唐晚还有半年寿命时，掌握了一种技能“穿越术”，能来回穿梭于现代与古代之间。
